title: BRUBAKER Teddy Plush Bear With Heart Red - Happy Birthday - 10 Inches (25 Cm) - Teddy Bear Plush Teddy Cuddly Toy - Light Brown
features: 💖 Give away a super cute love message: On Birthday to say thank you or a sweet way to show your partner how much you love him!
🧸 Simply to fall in love with - the BRUBAKER plush teddy bear is very soft, beautiful and cuddly and great to love, to cuddle, to play or just to be there when you need it

💖 This super soft plush teddy with its practical size of 10 Inches (25 Cm) fits easily into a nursery, a baby bag or e.g. on a work table - with its practical hanger the heart teddy can be attached everywhere decoratively
🧸 An absolute favourite - even after years this Teddy will still be a particularly beautiful, beloved memory
💖 The BRUBAKER label stands for first-class quality - the little plush bear is made of a fluffy, soft and hard-wearing plush material - with its fleece heart, this bear is easy to wash and care for
description: Product Description Give a Birthday Greeting that Comes from the Heart with the BRUBAKER Teddy! With its heartfelt message of love, the cuddly teddy banishes all worries and brings a joyful smile to the face of your loved ones. Simply to fall in love with! Tell someone close to you how you feel with the red plush heart. Let the cuddly bear become a new companion, a bear-strong lucky charm and soul comforter at the same time. The extra fluffy and soft teddy bear is made of high-quality plush and processed in the best quality. It is made of hard-wearing plush material with a fluffy interior. With its fleece heart, it is very washable and easy to care for. Whether young or old, big or small - nobody can resist his charm and he is needed for cuddling, hugging, hugging and sometimes also for comforting. The cuddly bear and its heartfelt message are ideal as a romantic gift idea for a birthday. Give the gift of good humour and a sentimental declaration of love! The approx. 10 inches high teddy bear is a fabulous gift for your loved one's special day! Enchant your partner with this love gift and make him or her a huge joy. Details of the BRUBAKER Teddy Bear Beautifully designed face and loving smile Cute and soft snub nose in brown Good-natured and shiny button eyes with dark brown iris, which are sewn tightly against tearing out Slightly contrasting coloured soles and snout in light brown Details of the BRUBAKER Teddy Bear Super fluffy fur that invites to cuddle and hug Lush and fluffy inner filling The red fabric heart cushion with its decorative stitching and embroidered birthday message skilfully rounds off the cuddly look of the teddy bear Details of the BRUBAKER Teddy Bear On his lower back he has a little bear tail in fur colour The teddy is beautiful from all sides and can thus be positioned freely in the room An absolute eye-catcher on the room divider, sideboard or nightstand Details of the BRUBAKER Teddy Bear At the top of the head, there is a loop between the ears to hang the bear, for example on : the door handle the bedpost the coat hook on the wardrobe the knob of the chest of drawers in the bedroom Front View Side View View from Behind Hanger Heart Pillow Details The heart-shaped cushion, which is firmly sewn to the teddy bear, is held in place by the bear's paws in front of his chest and is in a bright red colour. The message "Happy Birthday" embroidered with white thread is on the front. Above the heart, the teddy bears another shiny red bow on its neck. Attributes Made of non-toxic and flame retardant materials (100% polyester) Washable at 30 °C (hand wash) Premium brand quality and high-quality workmanship from BRUBAKER Teddy Bear & Heart 'Viel Glück!'
